'''竏喇-dh-h-p''' ('''kahadhhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quarrel|quarrel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quarrel|quarrel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-dh-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| kahadhhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihadhepoko|thihadhepoko]] || [[word:jihadhepoko|jihadhepoko]] || [[word:shihadhepoko|shihadhepoko]] || [[word:kihadhepoko|kihadhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhadhepoko|thuthuhadhepoko]] || [[word:jujuhadhepoko|jujuhadhepoko]] || [[word:shushuhadhepoko|shushuhadhepoko]] || [[word:kukuhadhepoko|kukuhadhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhadhepoko|thuhadhepoko]] || [[word:juhadhepoko|juhadhepoko]] || [[word:shuhadhepoko|shuhadhepoko]] || [[word:kuhadhepoko|kuhadhepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohadhepoko|thohadhepoko]] || [[word:johadhepoko|johadhepoko]] || [[word:shohadhepoko|shohadhepoko]] || [[word:kohadhepoko|kohadhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦhadhepoko|thﾃｦhadhepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦhadhepoko|jﾃｦhadhepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦhadhepoko|shﾃｦhadhepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦhadhepoko|kﾃｦhadhepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahadhepoko|thahadhepoko]] || [[word:jahadhepoko|jahadhepoko]] || [[word:shahadhepoko|shahadhepoko]] || [[word:kahadhepoko|kahadhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahadhepoko|thahadhepoko]] || [[word:jahadhepoko|jahadhepoko]] || [[word:shahadhepoko|shahadhepoko]] || [[word:kahadhepoko|kahadhepoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
